info.title: Dexploit API
info.description: Real-time and historical Solana DEX swap and OHLCV data.

message.example: use pair_address; see /api/v1/pairs?token_address=X to discover pools

recent_volume_sol.description: Volume in SOL over a recent rolling window

token_amount.description: Token base units; divide by 10**token_decimals for human-readable

PoolEvent.description: Non-swap pool activity: LP deposit, LP withdraw, or SPL burn against the LP mint.

base_amount.description: Token base-mint amount in base units. 0 for `lp_burn`.

quote_amount.description: Quote-mint amount in base units (typically SOL lamports). 0 for `lp_burn`.

lp_token_amount.description: LP token amount in base units. For Meteora `lp_deposit` events this is saturated to `u64::MAX` when the underlying value overflows — see [Pool events](/concepts/pool-events).

TokenMetadata.description: On-chain metadata + audit roll-up for a single mint.

supply_atomic.description: Token supply in base units (not divided by 10**decimals).

image_url_cached.description: Dexploit-hosted thumbnail; null until the cacher has fetched it.

top10_pct.description: % of supply held by top-10 wallets, 0-100. Null until the holder snapshot completes.

TokenIntel.description: Aggregated per-mint intel: first buyers, insiders, top holders, dev history, price/volume deltas.

snipers.description: First 10 distinct buyers within the first 30 slots after mint.

buy_ts.description: Unix milliseconds of the first buy.

insiders.description: Holders with non-zero balance who never traded on a DEX.

balance_atomic.description: u64 as decimal string to preserve precision above 2^53.

top_70.description: Top 70 holders by balance, enriched with wallet-intel tags.

success_rate.description: % of this creator's pump.fun mints that graduated. 0-100.

total_launches.description: Total pump.fun mints by this creator.

change_pct.description: Price change % over the listed windows, computed from the highest-volume pair.

bonding_pct.description: Pump.fun bonding-curve completion, 0-1. Null for non-pump.fun mints.

counts.description: How many holders of this mint carry each wallet-intel tag. See [Wallet-intel tags](/concepts/wallet-intel-tags).

snapshot_ts.description: Unix seconds when the snapshot was taken.

is_partial.description: True when the snapshot was truncated (very large holder sets).

ConcentrationResponse.description: Snapshot-driven concentration metrics. See [Holders](/concepts/holders) for the difference between this and `intel.holders`.

gini.description: Gini coefficient over the snapshot, 0-1. Null when the snapshot is too sparse.

oracle.description: Pyth-Hermes SOL/USD snapshot used to compute the *_usd fields. Null when the oracle was unreachable.

confidence.description: Pyth confidence interval, same units as `price`.

current_value_sol.description: Null when no recent price is available.

price_stale.description: True when the last-known price is older than the freshness window.

mint.description: Mint this tag is scoped to. Some tags are mint-scoped (insider, sniper), others are global.

first_ts.description: Unix milliseconds of earliest swap in the window.

last_ts.description: Unix milliseconds of latest swap in the window.

new_pool.description: Post-graduation AMM pool address. Null pre-graduation.

AlertRule.description: Tagged union — pick exactly one shape based on `type`.

get.description:
List on-chain pools indexed by Dexploit.

With no parameters: returns up to `limit` pools across all DEXs. Pass `protocol` to filter by DEX (e.g. `pumpswap`). Pass `token_address` to find every pool that trades a specific token, sorted by recent SOL volume — this is the discovery path for the `pair_address` you'll pass to candle and swap endpoints.

`token_address` and `protocol` can be combined; if both are present, `token_address` is the primary filter.

parameters.name: token_address
parameters.description: Token mint to find pools for. When set, the response is sorted by recent SOL volume.

get.description:
Returns OHLCV bars for `pair_address` between `start` and `end`. Bars are built from real swap events — see [Swap-event OHLCV](/concepts/swap-event-ohlcv).

**Requires `pair_address`.** Sending `mint`, `pair`, or `protocol` returns 400 with a pointer to /api/v1/pairs.

400.description: Missing pair_address or sent legacy mint/pair/protocol

error.message: use pair_address; see /api/v1/pairs?token_address=X to discover pools

get.summary: Most recent candles for a pool
get.description: Returns the most-recent N candles. Same `pair_address` requirement as /api/v1/candles.
Returns recent swaps with optional filters. Use this for a real-time-ish polling view; for true real-time, use [WebSocket](/streaming/websocket) or [gRPC](/streaming/grpc).

parameters.name: min_sol
parameters.description: Minimum SOL amount (decimal SOL, not lamports)

get.description: Page through historical swaps within a time or slot range.
Returns recent swaps with `sol_amount` above a threshold (default 10 SOL).
Look up the swap event(s) emitted by a specific Solana transaction.
All swaps a wallet has made, across pools and DEXs.

get.summary: Swap history for a token (across pools)
get.description: Returns swaps for a token across **every** pool we index. This is one of the few endpoints where token mint (not `pair_address`) is the right input — it intentionally aggregates. See [Pairs vs tokens](/concepts/pairs-vs-tokens).
Aggregate stats across the platform for the last 24h.
Aggregate stats for a token mint across every indexed pool. One of the few endpoints where token mint is correct (see [Pairs vs tokens](/concepts/pairs-vs-tokens)).
Tokens with the largest 24h volume change.
Pools with the largest absolute price change over the requested timeframe.

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: Window over which to compute price change.

error.message: Failed to deserialize query string: missing field `timeframe`

get.description: Roll-up stats across the OHLCV index.

LP deposits, LP withdraws, and SPL burns against the LP mint, across pumpswap / raydium / meteora. `token` is required — there is no unfiltered scan. See [Pool events](/concepts/pool-events) for the per-DEX caveats.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Cursor — return events with `timestamp_ms` strictly less than this. Use `events[events.length-1].timestamp_ms` for the next page.

total.description: Number of events in this page (equals `events.length`).

has_more.description: True when `total == limit`; use `before` to page.

empty.summary: Mint with no LP activity yet

get.description: Look up metadata + audit roll-up for many mints in one call. Accepts a comma-separated `mints` list; the response order is not guaranteed to match input order — key by `mint`.

parameters.name: mints
parameters.description: Comma-separated mint list. Practical cap ~200 per call.

get.description: Metadata + audit roll-up for one mint. Equivalent to `/tokens?mints=<mint>` but returns the bare `TokenMetadata` object (no wrapping `tokens` array).

Mint-authority / freeze-authority / LP-burn audit flags plus the top-10 concentration percentage. `top10_pct` is null until the first holder snapshot completes — kick one off with [POST /tokens/{mint}/snapshot-now](/api-reference/tokens/post-snapshot-now).

One-call dashboard view: first buyers, insiders, top holders, dev history, price/volume deltas, holders count. Cached 60s in-process and 30s at the edge.

The `snipers` / `insiders` paths trigger a fire-and-forget recompute on cold cache — the first call after a long idle may return empty arrays; the next call has data.

get.summary: Wallet-intel tag counts for a mint
get.description: Counts of holders carrying each [wallet-intel tag](/concepts/wallet-intel-tags). Sourced from the latest holder snapshot crossed with the wallet-tags table.

Per-wallet balances from the most recent holder snapshot for this mint. See [Holders](/concepts/holders) for snapshot freshness vs. live-trade-derived counts.

Cold mints return an empty `holders` array with `snapshot_ts` set to the time the empty placeholder was written; kick a real snapshot with [POST /tokens/{mint}/snapshot-now](/api-reference/holders/post-snapshot-now).

Snapshot-derived concentration metrics: total holders, top-10 / top-100 percentages, and Gini coefficient. Read against the same snapshot as [/tokens/{mint}/holders](/api-reference/holders/get-tokenholders).

post.description: Queue an immediate holder-snapshot run for this mint. The endpoint returns 202 as soon as the job is queued — the snapshot completes asynchronously (typically under a minute). Poll [/tokens/{mint}/holders](/api-reference/holders/get-tokenholders) for the result.

estimated_seconds.description: Rough ETA until the snapshot is written.

get.description: Realized and unrealized SOL + USD PnL over a window. USD values use the embedded Pyth SOL/USD snapshot — keep `oracle.confidence` in mind when consuming `*_usd` fields.
Counter-based stats: total trades, sells, winning sells, best/worst trade in SOL, total volume in SOL.
Paged list of swap-trades for one wallet, newest first. Page with `before` (Unix milliseconds) using `next_before` from the previous page.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Cursor — return trades with timestamp strictly less than this.

next_before.description: Pass back as `before` for the next page. Null at the end of history.

get.description: Per-mint holdings with cost-basis and (when a recent price is available) current value and unrealized PnL.
Cohort tags this wallet has earned (dev, fresh, insider, kol, smart_money, sniper, whale). See [Wallet-intel tags](/concepts/wallet-intel-tags) for what each tag means and how it's computed.

post.description:
ClickHouse-backed screener over the swap index. Body filters combine as AND; results are paged via `limit` (cap 500) + `offset`.

A few filters are accepted but **silently ignored** in this release — when they are, the response carries an `X-Filter-Deferred` header listing the skipped names. Currently deferred: `audit`, `liquidity_sol`, `trending_score`, and `sectors` when the sector cache is cold.

get.description: Newly-created, completing (near the 85 SOL graduation threshold), or graduated pump.fun mints. Filter with `status`; page back in time with `before` (Unix seconds) using `next_before_ts` from the previous response.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: `new` = mint created. `completing` = bonding curve >80%. `migrated` = graduated to an AMM pool.

next_before_ts.description: Pass as `before` for the next page. Null when no events were returned.

500.description: Unknown `status` (the server returns the error message in the body)

get.description:
Returns every alert configured on the authenticated user's account.

**Status:** the terminal alert surface is currently in fixture-mode — responses are stable shapes but writes do not yet persist and notifications are not yet delivered. Track integration status via [status.dexploit.dev](https://www.dexploit.dev/status).

post.description: Create a new alert rule with one or more notification channels. See [GET /alerts](/api-reference/alerts/listalerts) for the fixture-mode caveat.

patch.description: Partial update — only send the fields you want to change. Same fixture-mode caveat as [GET /alerts](/api-reference/alerts/listalerts).

delete.description: Delete an alert by id. Same fixture-mode caveat as [GET /alerts](/api-reference/alerts/listalerts).

get.description: Returns 200 if the API process is alive. Requires authentication like every other endpoint.
Returns 200 if dependencies (ClickHouse, cache) are healthy; 503 otherwise. Requires authentication.
